meaning: n.转炉,[电工]变换器,变流器
examples: Search for and instantiate the appropriate convertor.
The example code in listing 1 shows a full convertor tag.
In this version of dwr.xml, I've added both a creator and a convertor for Cart.
Finland is of particular interest since one of the two frequency convertor drives that Stuxnet issues commands to is made by a Finnish company, Vacon PLC.
